channel.title: family-friendly-meat-dishes Posts - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh family-friendly-meat-dishes posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: Creamy Garlic Butter Shrimp with Zucchini Noodles
item.description: A detailed guide to making creamy garlic butter shrimp served on zucchini noodles. Understand how the sauce emulsifies with butter and cream, why zucchini noodles absorb flavors well, and how timing ensures shrimp stays tender and zucchini retains slight crunch.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 10 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 20 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 300g (10.5 oz) medium shrimp, peeled and deveined
  • 2 medium zucchinis (about 300g / 10.5 oz), spiralized into noodles
  • 3 tbsp (45g) unsalted butter
  • 4 cloves garlic, minced (about 12g)
  • 120ml (1/2 cup) heavy cream
  • 30g (1/4 cup) grated Parmesan cheese
  • 1 tbsp (15ml) olive oil
  • Salt, to taste
  • Freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 1/2 tsp (1g) red chili flakes (optional)
  • 1 tbsp (15ml) fresh lemon juice
  • 2 tbsp (8g) chopped fresh parsley for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #medium #unsalted

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Garlic Butter Shrimp with Zucchini Noodles
media:content.media:description: A detailed guide to making creamy garlic butter shrimp served on zucchini noodles. Understand how the sauce emulsifies with butter and cream, why zucchini noodles absorb flavors well, and how timing ensures shrimp stays tender and zucchini retains slight crunch.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229889885, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, medium, unsalted

item.title: One-Pot Chicken Stew with Spring Vegetables
item.description: A detailed recipe for a one-pot chicken stew that combines tender chicken with fresh spring vegetables. This stew uses slow simmering to meld flavors while keeping the chicken moist and the vegetables vibrant. Learn the science behind simmering, ingredient choices, and timing to achieve a balanced and textured stew.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 50 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 65 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 500g (1.1 lbs) boneless, skinless chicken thighs, cut into 2-inch (5cm) pieces
  • 2 tbsp (30ml) olive oil
  • 1 medium onion (150g), diced
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 2 medium carrots (150g), sliced into 1/4-inch (0.6cm) rounds
  • 150g (1 cup) fresh or frozen peas
  • 150g (1 cup) fresh green beans, trimmed and halved
  • 1 medium leek (100g), cleaned and sliced into 1/4-inch (0.6cm) rings
  • 3 cups (720ml) low-sodium chicken broth
  • 1 tbsp (15ml) fresh lemon juice
  • 1 tsp (2g) dried thyme
  • 1/2 tsp (1g) dried rosemary, crushed
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • Optional: 1 tbsp (8g) cornstarch mixed with 2 tbsp (30ml) cold water for thickening

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Easypost #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #olive #medium

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: One-Pot Chicken Stew with Spring Vegetables
media:content.media:description: A detailed recipe for a one-pot chicken stew that combines tender chicken with fresh spring vegetables. This stew uses slow simmering to meld flavors while keeping the chicken moist and the vegetables vibrant. Learn the science behind simmering, ingredient choices, and timing to achieve a balanced and textured stew.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229889885, Easypost, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, boneless, olive, medium

item.title: Hearty Lunch Bowls with Simple Pantry Staples and Quick Dressing
item.description: A straightforward recipe for filling lunch bowls made from pantry staples and a quick homemade dressing. Ideal for meal prep, these bowls balance textures and flavors with minimal effort, offering a nutritious and satisfying midday meal.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 25 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

👩‍🍳 Instructions

media:content.media:title: Hearty Lunch Bowls with Simple Pantry Staples and Quick Dressing
media:content.media:description: A straightforward recipe for filling lunch bowls made from pantry staples and a quick homemade dressing. Ideal for meal prep, these bowls balance textures and flavors with minimal effort, offering a nutritious and satisfying midday meal.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229889885, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious

item.title: Baked Salmon with Spring Pea Puree: Tender and Vibrant Weeknight Dinner
item.description: This recipe for baked salmon paired with a fresh spring pea puree combines gentle cooking techniques to preserve the fish’s moisture and texture, while the puree adds a bright, natural sweetness. Learn how to balance timing and temperature to achieve flaky, tender salmon and a smooth, vibrant puree that complements it perfectly.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 30 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 salmon fillets (about 150g / 5 oz each), skin on or off as preferred
  • 1 tbsp (15ml) olive oil
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 250g (9 oz) fresh or frozen shelled peas
  • 1 small shallot (30g), finely chopped
  • 1 tbsp (15ml) unsalted butter (or olive oil for dairy-free)
  • 60ml (1/4 cup) vegetable or chicken broth
  • Juice of 1/2 lemon (about 15ml)
  • Fresh mint leaves (optional, about 5g) for puree
  • Salt and pepper to taste for puree

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #salmon #olive #freshly

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Baked Salmon with Spring Pea Puree: Tender and Vibrant Weeknight Dinner
media:content.media:description: This recipe for baked salmon paired with a fresh spring pea puree combines gentle cooking techniques to preserve the fish’s moisture and texture, while the puree adds a bright, natural sweetness. Learn how to balance timing and temperature to achieve flaky, tender salmon and a smooth, vibrant puree that complements it perfectly.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229889885, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, salmon, olive, freshly

item.title: One-Pan Lemon Herb Chicken with Roasted Asparagus
item.description: A straightforward one-pan recipe featuring juicy chicken breasts seasoned with fresh lemon and herbs, roasted alongside tender asparagus. This dish balances bright citrus notes with earthy roasted vegetables, ideal for quick weeknight dinners or light seasonal meals.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 25 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 35 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 boneless, skinless chicken breasts (about 6-7 oz / 170-200 g each)
  • 1 bunch (about 200 g) fresh asparagus, trimmed
  • 2 tablespoons (30 ml) olive oil, divided
  • 1 lemon, zested and juiced
  • 2 garlic cloves, minced
  • 1 teaspoon (1 g) dried thyme (or 1 tablespoon fresh thyme leaves)
  • 1 teaspoon (1 g) dried oregano (or 1 tablespoon fresh oregano leaves)
  • Salt, to taste (about 1/2 teaspoon / 3 g)
  • Black pepper, freshly ground, to taste (about 1/4 teaspoon / 0.5 g)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #bunch #olive

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: One-Pan Lemon Herb Chicken with Roasted Asparagus
media:content.media:description: A straightforward one-pan recipe featuring juicy chicken breasts seasoned with fresh lemon and herbs, roasted alongside tender asparagus. This dish balances bright citrus notes with earthy roasted vegetables, ideal for quick weeknight dinners or light seasonal meals.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229889885, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, boneless, bunch, olive

item.title: Classic Moist Buttermilk Birthday Cake from Scratch
item.description: A straightforward recipe for a moist birthday cake made from scratch, highlighting the role of buttermilk and vanilla in achieving a tender crumb. This cake balances simple ingredients with precise technique to deliver a reliable, soft-textured cake that holds up well for celebrations.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 50 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 8

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

media:content.media:title: Classic Moist Buttermilk Birthday Cake from Scratch
media:content.media:description: A straightforward recipe for a moist birthday cake made from scratch, highlighting the role of buttermilk and vanilla in achieving a tender crumb. This cake balances simple ingredients with precise technique to deliver a reliable, soft-textured cake that holds up well for celebrations.

item.title: Cozy Comforting Beef Stew for Cold Winter Nights
item.description: A guide to making beef stew that extracts maximum flavor from the beef and builds a properly textured broth. Learn why specific cuts work, how browning creates flavor compounds, and how to time vegetable additions for ideal texture in each component.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 120 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 140 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 lbs (900g) beef chuck, cut into 1.5-inch (4cm) pieces
  • 3 tbsp (45ml) neutral oil or bacon fat, divided
  • 1 large yellow onion (300g), cut into 1-inch (2.5cm) pieces
  • 4 cloves (20g) garlic, sliced
  • 2 tbsp (30g) tomato paste
  • 4 cups (960ml) beef broth, unsalted preferred
  • 1 cup (240ml) water or additional broth
  • 2 tsp (10g) fine sea salt, divided
  • 1/2 tsp (1g) black pepper
  • 1.5 tsp (3g) dried thyme
  • 1 tsp (2g) dried rosemary, crushed
  • 1 bay leaf
  • 1 tbsp (15ml) Worcestershire sauce
  • 3 large carrots (350g), cut into 1.5-inch (4cm) pieces
  • 3 medium potatoes (450g), cut into 1-inch (2.5cm) cubes
  • 1 cup (150g) frozen peas, added near end
  • Optional: 1 tbsp (8g) cornstarch mixed with 2 tbsp (30ml) cold water for thickening

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Mediumpost #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #chuck #neutral #large

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Cozy Comforting Beef Stew for Cold Winter Nights
media:content.media:description: A guide to making beef stew that extracts maximum flavor from the beef and builds a properly textured broth. Learn why specific cuts work, how browning creates flavor compounds, and how to time vegetable additions for ideal texture in each component.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229889885, Mediumpost, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, chuck, neutral, large

item.title: Classic Beef Stew: Mastering Flavor and Texture for Family Dinners
item.description: A detailed method for making beef stew that focuses on developing deep flavor through proper browning and achieving tender beef by slow simmering. Includes insights on cut selection, timing for vegetable additions, and broth consistency.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 120 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 140 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 lbs (900g) beef chuck, cut into 1.5-inch (4cm) pieces
  • 3 tbsp (45ml) neutral oil or bacon fat, divided
  • 1 large yellow onion (300g), cut into 1-inch (2.5cm) pieces
  • 4 cloves (20g) garlic, sliced
  • 2 tbsp (30g) tomato paste
  • 4 cups (960ml) beef broth, unsalted preferred
  • 1 cup (240ml) water or additional broth
  • 2 tsp (10g) fine sea salt, divided
  • 1/2 tsp (1g) black pepper
  • 1.5 tsp (3g) dried thyme
  • 1 tsp (2g) dried rosemary, crushed
  • 1 bay leaf
  • 1 tbsp (15ml) Worcestershire sauce
  • 3 large carrots (350g), cut into 1.5-inch (4cm) pieces
  • 3 medium potatoes (450g), cut into 1-inch (2.5cm) cubes
  • 1 cup (150g) frozen peas, added near end

item.title: Classic Easter Lamb Cake with Tender Sponge and Buttercream Frosting
item.description: This Easter lamb cake recipe offers a tender, moist sponge shaped into a charming lamb and generously frosted with creamy buttercream. It captures the nostalgic feel of spring gatherings while balancing light sweetness and a soft texture that’s satisfying without being heavy. The cake is ideal for family celebrations and seasonal brunches.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 30 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 35 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 8

📊 Difficulty: Medium

media:content.media:title: Classic Easter Lamb Cake with Tender Sponge and Buttercream Frosting
media:content.media:description: This Easter lamb cake recipe offers a tender, moist sponge shaped into a charming lamb and generously frosted with creamy buttercream. It captures the nostalgic feel of spring gatherings while balancing light sweetness and a soft texture that’s satisfying without being heavy. The cake is ideal for family celebrations and seasonal brunches.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229889885, Mediumpost, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious

item.title: Creamy Roasted Garlic Mashed Potatoes for Easter Dinner
item.description: This recipe for mashed potatoes incorporates slow-roasted garlic to deliver a subtle, rich flavor that elevates the classic side dish. The creamy texture and gentle garlic aroma make it a thoughtful choice for Easter dinner or any springtime gathering where comfort and subtlety matter.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 45 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 60 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 lbs (900g) Yukon Gold potatoes, peeled and cut into 2-inch chunks
  • 1 whole head garlic
  • 2 tbsp (30ml) olive oil
  • 1/2 cup (120ml) whole milk, warmed
  • 4 tbsp (60g) unsalted butter, cut into pieces
  • Salt, to taste (start with 1 tsp / 5g)
  • Freshly ground black pepper, to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #yukon #whole #olive

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Roasted Garlic Mashed Potatoes for Easter Dinner
media:content.media:description: This recipe for mashed potatoes incorporates slow-roasted garlic to deliver a subtle, rich flavor that elevates the classic side dish. The creamy texture and gentle garlic aroma make it a thoughtful choice for Easter dinner or any springtime gathering where comfort and subtlety matter.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229889885, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, yukon, whole, olive

item.title: Classic Beef Stew: Mastering Browning and Braising for Rich Flavor
item.description: A guide to making beef stew that extracts maximum flavor from the beef and builds a properly textured broth. Learn why specific cuts work, how browning creates flavor compounds, and how to time vegetable additions for ideal texture in each component.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 120 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 140 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 lbs (900g) beef chuck, cut into 1.5-inch (4cm) pieces
  • 3 tbsp (45ml) neutral oil or bacon fat, divided
  • 1 large yellow onion (300g), cut into 1-inch (2.5cm) pieces
  • 4 cloves (20g) garlic, sliced
  • 2 tbsp (30g) tomato paste

item.title: Easter Dirt Cake: Creamy Layers with Gummy Worms for a Nostalgic Treat
item.description: An easy-to-make Easter Dirt Cake featuring layers of creamy filling and crushed chocolate cookies, topped with gummy worms to create a fun 'dirt' appearance. This dessert combines smooth textures with a playful look, making it ideal for family gatherings and kids’ parties during springtime celebrations.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 15 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 8

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 450 g (16 oz) cream cheese, softened
  • 240 ml (1 cup) heavy cream, cold
  • 150 g (3/4 cup) powdered sugar, sifted
  • 1 tsp vanilla extract
  • 200 g (7 oz) instant chocolate pudding mix (dry)
  • 480 ml (2 cups) cold milk
  • 150 g (about 1 and 1/2 cups) crushed chocolate sandwich cookies (such as Oreos), filling removed
  • 100 g (3.5 oz) gummy worms
  • Optional: 2 tbsp (30 ml) milk or cream for thinning pudding
  • Optional: Fresh berries or mint for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #cream #heavy #powdered

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easter Dirt Cake: Creamy Layers with Gummy Worms for a Nostalgic Treat
media:content.media:description: An easy-to-make Easter Dirt Cake featuring layers of creamy filling and crushed chocolate cookies, topped with gummy worms to create a fun 'dirt' appearance. This dessert combines smooth textures with a playful look, making it ideal for family gatherings and kids’ parties during springtime celebrations.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229889885, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, cream, heavy, powdered

item.title: Herb-Crusted Salmon Recipe for Easter Dinner
item.description: A straightforward herb-crusted salmon recipe that balances crisp textures and moist, tender fish. The crust seals in juices while fresh herbs provide brightness. Ideal for spring occasions like Easter, this dish pairs well with seasonal vegetables for a light and elegant meal.
item.dc:creator: author_001

media:content.media:description: A straightforward herb-crusted salmon recipe that balances crisp textures and moist, tender fish. The crust seals in juices while fresh herbs provide brightness. Ideal for spring occasions like Easter, this dish pairs well with seasonal vegetables for a light and elegant meal.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229889885, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious

item.title: Deviled Eggs Shaped Like Easter Chicks: A Spring Gathering Favorite
item.description: This recipe transforms traditional deviled eggs into charming Easter chick shapes, combining the familiar creamy yolk filling with playful olive eyes. It's a fun and approachable dish that brings a festive touch to springtime gatherings without complicating preparation.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 10 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 30 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 6 large eggs
  • 3 tbsp (45g) mayonnaise
  • 1 tsp (5ml) Dijon mustard
  • 1 tsp (5ml) white vinegar or lemon juice
  • 1/4 tsp (1g) salt
  • 1/8 tsp (0.5g) black pepper
  • 1/4 tsp (0.5g) smoked paprika (optional)
  • 6 small black olives, pitted
  • 6 small carrot pieces or thin strips (for beaks)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #large #mayonnaise #dijon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Deviled Eggs Shaped Like Easter Chicks: A Spring Gathering Favorite
media:content.media:description: This recipe transforms traditional deviled eggs into charming Easter chick shapes, combining the familiar creamy yolk filling with playful olive eyes. It's a fun and approachable dish that brings a festive touch to springtime gatherings without complicating preparation.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229889885, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, large, mayonnaise, dijon

item.title: Fluffy Bunny-Shaped Pancakes for Easter Morning
item.description: A recipe for fluffy bunny-shaped pancakes that bring a festive touch to Easter breakfast. This version highlights a gentle vanilla flavor and uses fresh berries to create expressive faces, making it a joyful meal for families celebrating spring together.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 25 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 1/2 cups (190g) all-purpose flour
  • 2 tbsp (25g) granulated sugar
  • 1 tbsp (15g) baking powder
  • 1/4 tsp (1g) salt
  • 1 1/4 cups (300ml) whole milk (or dairy-free alternative)
  • 1 large egg, lightly beaten
  • 3 tbsp (45ml) unsalted butter, melted, plus extra for cooking
  • 1 tsp (5ml) pure vanilla extract
  • Fresh berries (blueberries, raspberries, or blackberries) for decorating bunny faces

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #allpurpose #granulated #baking

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

media:content.media:title: Fluffy Bunny-Shaped Pancakes for Easter Morning
media:content.media:description: A recipe for fluffy bunny-shaped pancakes that bring a festive touch to Easter breakfast. This version highlights a gentle vanilla flavor and uses fresh berries to create expressive faces, making it a joyful meal for families celebrating spring together.

item.title: Classic Beef Stew Recipe for Cozy Family Meals
item.description: A guide to making beef stew that extracts maximum flavor from the beef and builds a properly textured broth. Learn why specific cuts work, how browning creates flavor compounds, and how to time vegetable additions for ideal texture in each component.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 120 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 140 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 lbs (900g) beef chuck, cut into 1.5-inch (4cm) pieces
  • 3 tbsp (45ml) neutral oil or bacon fat, divided
  • 1 large yellow onion (300g), cut into 1-inch (2.5cm) pieces
  • 4 cloves (20g) garlic, sliced
  • 2 tbsp (30g) tomato paste
  • 4 cups (960ml) beef broth, unsalted preferred
  • 1 cup (240ml) water or additional broth
  • 2 tsp (10g) fine sea salt, divided
  • 1/2 tsp (1g) black pepper
  • 1.5 tsp (3g) dried thyme
  • 1 tsp (2g) dried rosemary, crushed
  • 1 bay leaf
  • 1 tbsp (15ml) Worcestershire sauce
  • 3 large carrots (350g), cut into 1.5-inch (4cm) pieces
  • 3 medium potatoes (450g), cut into 1-inch (2.5cm) cubes
  • 1 cup (150g) frozen peas, added near end
  • Optional: 1 tbsp (8g) cornstarch mixed with 2 tbsp (30ml) cold water for thickening

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Mediumpost #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #chuck #neutral #large

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Classic Beef Stew Recipe for Cozy Family Meals
media:content.media:description: A guide to making beef stew that extracts maximum flavor from the beef and builds a properly textured broth. Learn why specific cuts work, how browning creates flavor compounds, and how to time vegetable additions for ideal texture in each component.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229889885, Mediumpost, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, chuck, neutral, large

item.title: Easter Nest Cookies: A Springtime Treat with Toasted Coconut and Mini Chocolate Eggs
item.description: These Easter nest cookies combine the crisp texture of toasted coconut and crunchy chow mein noodles with the festive touch of mini chocolate eggs. Ideal for spring gatherings, their light sweetness and delicate crunch offer a nostalgic yet fresh treat for all ages.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 10 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 25 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 24

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 3 cups (75g) chow mein noodles
  • 2 cups (160g) shredded unsweetened coconut
  • 1/2 cup (115g) unsalted butter
  • 1/2 cup (100g) granulated sugar
  • 1/4 cup (60ml) golden syrup (or light corn syrup as substitute)
  • 1 tsp (5ml) vanilla extract
  • Mini chocolate eggs (about 48 pieces)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #noodles #shredded #unsalted

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

media:content.media:title: Easter Nest Cookies: A Springtime Treat with Toasted Coconut and Mini Chocolate Eggs
media:content.media:description: These Easter nest cookies combine the crisp texture of toasted coconut and crunchy chow mein noodles with the festive touch of mini chocolate eggs. Ideal for spring gatherings, their light sweetness and delicate crunch offer a nostalgic yet fresh treat for all ages.

item.title: Classic Easter Dinner Menu: Timeless Recipes for Stress-Free Family Gatherings
item.description: Planning a relaxed Easter feast with family can be overwhelming, but this classic Easter dinner menu simplifies the process with dishes that can be prepared ahead without sacrificing flavor or freshness. From a perfectly glazed ham to seasonal sides, this meal balances tradition with practical timing, making it ideal for spring holiday celebrations.
item.dc:creator: author_001

media:content.media:description: Planning a relaxed Easter feast with family can be overwhelming, but this classic Easter dinner menu simplifies the process with dishes that can be prepared ahead without sacrificing flavor or freshness. From a perfectly glazed ham to seasonal sides, this meal balances tradition with practical timing, making it ideal for spring holiday celebrations.

item.title: Classic Scalloped Potatoes with Garlic and Cheese
item.description: A detailed guide to making scalloped potatoes that are tender, creamy, and perfectly flavored with garlic and cheese. Learn how to slice potatoes thinly to absorb the sauce, how to balance moisture and baking time to avoid sogginess or dryness, and why resting after baking improves texture.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 60 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 80 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1.5 kg (3.3 lbs) Yukon Gold potatoes, peeled
  • 3 tbsp (45 g) unsalted butter
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 3 tbsp (24 g) all-purpose flour
  • 2 ½ cups (600 ml) whole milk, warmed
  • 1 cup (100 g) sharp cheddar cheese, grated
  • ½ cup (50 g) Gruyère cheese, grated (optional)
  • 1 tsp (6 g) fine sea salt, divided
  • ½ tsp (1 g) freshly ground black pepper
  • ½ tsp (1 g) freshly grated nutmeg (optional)
  • 2 tbsp (8 g) fresh parsley, chopped for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Mediumpost #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #yukon #unsalted #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Classic Scalloped Potatoes with Garlic and Cheese
media:content.media:description: A detailed guide to making scalloped potatoes that are tender, creamy, and perfectly flavored with garlic and cheese. Learn how to slice potatoes thinly to absorb the sauce, how to balance moisture and baking time to avoid sogginess or dryness, and why resting after baking improves texture.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229889885, Mediumpost, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, yukon, unsalted, cloves

item.title: Herb-Rubbed Leg of Lamb for Easter Dinner
item.description: A straightforward recipe for leg of lamb rubbed with garlic, rosemary, and herbs, delivering a juicy and flavorful centerpiece for Easter dinner. Learn how to prepare the rub, roast the lamb to tender perfection, and time everything for a stress-free festive meal.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 20 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 90 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 110 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 leg of lamb, bone-in, 4-5 lbs (1.8-2.3 kg), trimmed of excess fat
  • 6 cloves garlic, minced
  • 3 tbsp fresh rosemary, finely chopped
  • 2 tbsp fresh thyme leaves
  • 2 tsp coarse sea salt
  • 1 tsp freshly ground black pepper
  • 2 tbsp olive oil
  • 1 lemon, zested and juiced
  • Optional: 1 tsp Dijon mustard

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Mediumpost #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #bonein #cloves #fresh

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

media:content.media:description: A straightforward recipe for leg of lamb rubbed with garlic, rosemary, and herbs, delivering a juicy and flavorful centerpiece for Easter dinner. Learn how to prepare the rub, roast the lamb to tender perfection, and time everything for a stress-free festive meal.

item.title: Easter Egg Cake Pops Recipe: A Moist and Colorful Spring Treat
item.description: Learn how to make moist and colorful Easter egg cake pops using a secret ingredient that keeps them tender. This recipe guides you through every step, from baking to decorating, ideal for spring celebrations and family gatherings.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 30 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 25 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 55 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 12

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 box (15.25 oz / 432g) white cake mix
  • 1 cup (240ml) water
  • 1/3 cup (80ml) vegetable oil
  • 3 large eggs
  • 1/2 cup (120g) sour cream (secret ingredient for moistness)
  • 200g white candy melts or white chocolate, for coating
  • Food coloring gels in pastel colors (pink, blue, yellow, green)
  • Sprinkles and edible decorations for garnish
  • 12 wooden lollipop sticks

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

media:content.media:description: Learn how to make moist and colorful Easter egg cake pops using a secret ingredient that keeps them tender. This recipe guides you through every step, from baking to decorating, ideal for spring celebrations and family gatherings.

🥘 Ingredients

  • 3 tbsp (45ml) neutral oil or bacon fat, divided
  • 1 large yellow onion (300g), cut into 1-inch (2.5cm) pieces

item.title: Vibrant Fruit Kabobs: A Colorful Snack Kids Will Enjoy
item.description: This recipe offers a simple, fresh way to encourage kids to enjoy fruit. By threading a variety of colorful fruits onto skewers, the snack becomes visually appealing and easy to eat. These fruit kabobs work well for parties, school snacks, or a light, refreshing summer treat.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 15 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 8

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup (150g) strawberries, hulled and halved
  • 1 cup (150g) seedless green grapes
  • 1 cup (150g) seedless red grapes
  • 1 cup (150g) pineapple chunks, fresh or canned (drained)
  • 1 cup (150g) cantaloupe or honeydew melon, cut into 1-inch cubes
  • 1 kiwi, peeled and sliced into rounds
  • 1 banana, sliced into 1/2-inch thick rounds (optional, add last to prevent browning)
  • 8 wooden skewers, soaked in water for 30 minutes to prevent burning

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #strawberries #seedless

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: This recipe offers a simple, fresh way to encourage kids to enjoy fruit. By threading a variety of colorful fruits onto skewers, the snack becomes visually appealing and easy to eat. These fruit kabobs work well for parties, school snacks, or a light, refreshing summer treat.

item.title: Classic Easter Ham with Brown Sugar Mustard Glaze
item.description: A straightforward recipe for a traditional Easter ham, featuring a brown sugar and mustard glaze that caramelizes to a glossy, flavorful crust. Learn how to achieve the right balance of sweetness and tang, how to time the glaze application for optimal caramelization, and tips to keep the ham moist and tender throughout roasting.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 90 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 105 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 8

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 fully cooked bone-in ham, 6-8 lbs (2.7-3.6 kg)
  • 1/2 cup (100g) brown sugar, packed
  • 2 tbsp (30g) Dijon mustard (or yellow mustard for milder flavor)
  • 1 tbsp (15ml) apple cider vinegar or fresh lemon juice
  • 1/2 tsp (3g) ground black pepper
  • Optional: whole cloves for studding the ham (about 20-25 cloves)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Mediumpost #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #fully #brown #dijon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Classic Easter Ham with Brown Sugar Mustard Glaze
media:content.media:description: A straightforward recipe for a traditional Easter ham, featuring a brown sugar and mustard glaze that caramelizes to a glossy, flavorful crust. Learn how to achieve the right balance of sweetness and tang, how to time the glaze application for optimal caramelization, and tips to keep the ham moist and tender throughout roasting.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229889885, Mediumpost, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, fully, brown, dijon

item.title: Classic Easter Bunny Cupcakes Recipe: Vanilla Cupcakes with Buttercream and Candy Decorations
item.description: A tried-and-true recipe for fluffy vanilla cupcakes paired with smooth buttercream frosting, decorated with simple candy bunny faces. This recipe balances texture and sweetness, making it an ideal treat for Easter brunch or springtime celebrations. I’ll walk through the science behind the cupcake crumb and frosting consistency to help you get consistent results.
item.dc:creator: author_001
